subcodes.title: Answer to questions, Dublin, 1912-08-08
subcodes.first_line: Some of the philosophers believe that God is the Supreme Reality and that every human being has a spark of this divine reality within him
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعضی از فلاسفه را عقیده اینست که او حقیقت فائقه ئی است که در هر انسانی شراره ئی از آن قوهٴ فائقه موجود و او خود در نهایت قوت است
subcodes.subjects: @God as immanent vs. transcendent reality, @essential vs. actional attributes of God, @emanation vs. manifestation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
